The value of `EPSILON_PROBE_RATE` in alternator.ts is **0.05** (5%).

The constant is `DEFAULT_EPSILON_PROBE_RATE = 0.05` — it controls the probability that a gated (`useArchimedes: false`) pattern will override the competence gate and let Archimedes attempt the task anyway. This periodic probing keeps the competence score "live" so it can update if the underlying model improves, rather than being permanently locked out. It's kept low (5%) because each probe still pays the full cost of running Archimedes plus the large-model verification.[cache] hit=9088 miss=416 input=9504

This periodic probing keeps the competence score "live" so it can update if the underlying model improves, rather than being permanently locked out.
